basics.name: AKASH ANILKUMAR NAIR
basics.title: Economics Postgraduate & PGDM Finance Candidate
basics.summary: Detail-oriented Economics postgraduate currently pursuing a PGDM in Finance, bringing a strong academic foundation in market dynamics, financial systems, and economic analysis. Adept at breaking down data into strategic insights and supporting decision-making in fast-paced environments. Actively pursuing opportunities in finance to contribute analytical discipline and a performance-driven mindset.

bullets: Responsible for organizing and handling 30+ events for the department.

projects.title: Dissertation - An Empirical Study on Disaggregate Inflation in Maharashtra
bullets: Used econometric modelling and other core skills to evaluate component-wise price behavior and inflation persistence.
Built a structured analytical framework using statistical tools to assess sectoral inflation volatility.
Contributed to evidence-based insights for state-level macroeconomic policy.
